title: Toire no hanako san - Hanako Vs. Yôsuke
original_title: トイレの花子さん新章 花子VSヨースケ
overview: Shizukune is an exorcist in training. She travels with her teacher Miyo. Rock band members Jo, Mika and Aki sneak in an abandoned school because of a bet. Shizukune arrives at the school to expel the evil there. She comes face to face with a dark spirit.
